header.title: Roles
header.description: Define what people can do. Each role bundles a set of permissions; users inherit a role's permissions by being assigned to it.
empty.searchDesc: Nothing matches “{{term}}”. Try a different term.
empty.title: No roles defined yet.
empty.description: Create your first role to start bundling permissions.
col.name: Name
detail.descriptionFallback: Inspect and edit this role's profile and permission grants.
detail.builtin.title: Built-in role — read only
detail.builtin.body: ships with the framework. Its name, description, and permissions are managed centrally. Create a custom role if you need a different set of grants.
detail.profile.title: Profile
detail.profile.descriptionSystem: Name and description — system roles cannot be renamed.
detail.profile.description: Name and description shown to operators when assigning users to this role.
detail.field.name: Name
detail.perm.title: Permissions
detail.perm.description: Pick what holders of this role can do. Root-only permissions take effect only on roles assigned in the root tenant.
detail.danger.title: Danger zone
detail.danger.description: Delete this role. Users assigned to it will lose every permission this role grants — this is not reversible.
create.title: New role
create.description: Create a role, then grant it permissions on its detail page. The role name is what shows up in user role assignments — choose something descriptive.
create.field.name: Name
create.field.descriptionHint: Optional. Plain English explaining what this role is for.
